title: apply_formula
description: Apply formulas to cells or ranges in a spreadsheet. Supports single-cell formulas, array formulas, and named ranges. Can also create and manage named ranges.

cell.description: Target cell in A1 notation (e.g. 'E2', required for set_formula)

range.description: Target range for array formula or named range (e.g. 'A1:D10')

named_range_name.description: Name for the named range (required for create/delete_named_range)

fill_down.description: Auto-fill formula down the column to match adjacent data
